## Type of Change

Check all that apply:

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tested in at least one browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] No API keys or secrets are committed
- [ ] All user-facing strings use `t()` with keys in all 3 locales
- [ ] New HTML uses `escapeHtml()` where user input is rendered
- [ ] Mobile-friendly (44px touch targets, responsive)
